name: statistic-1
title: Statistic 1
description: Modern statistics grid with progress indicators and performance metrics

files.content:
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card' import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge' import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress' import { TrendingUp, DollarSign, Target, Star, Zap, BarChart3 } from 'lucide-react' const statsData = [ { id: 1, title: 'Sales', value: '482k', description: 'Monthly active users', progress: 78, progressLabel: 'Sales Target', icon: TrendingUp, }, { id: 2, title: 'Revenue', value: '$847K', description: 'Total revenue generated', progress: 92, progressLabel: 'Revenue Target', icon: DollarSign, }, { id: 3, title: 'Projects', value: '94%', description: 'Tasks completed on time', progress: 94, progressLabel: 'Project Target', icon: Target, }, { id: 4, title: 'Rating', value: '4.8', description: 'Average rating score', progress: 96, progressLabel: 'Rating Target', icon: Star, }, { id: 5, title: 'Productivity', value: '78%', description: 'Above baseline performance', progress: 78, progressLabel: 'Productivity Target', icon: Zap, }, ] export default function Statistic1() { return (
{/* Header Section */}
Performance Metrics

Track Your Success

Monitor key performance indicators and track your progress with real-time analytics

{/* Statistics Grid */}
{statsData.map(stat => (
{stat.title}
{stat.value}

{stat.description}
{stat.progressLabel} {stat.progress}%
))}
) }
